site.name: RankRadar

home.intro: Three rankings in one view. Data refreshed daily from official APIs.
home.sectionGithubDesc: Top-starred repos by time window (1d / 7d / 30d / 90d / all-time).
home.sectionModelsDesc: Rankings by intelligence, coding, math, speed, pricing (543 models on Artificial Analysis).
home.sectionOpenRouterDesc: Most-used apps by tokens and requests — popular and trending.

github.title: GitHub Top by Window
github.subtitle: Top-starred repos — 1d, 7d, 30d, 90d, and all-time windows.
github.caveat: "Top new by window" measures popularity among newly-created repos — not trending with deltas (that would need historical snapshots in DB). Same as github.com/trending.
